# Purpose

This file is the reusable completion template for major implementation tasks.
It exists so humans and AI agents can document what changed, what was learned, and what remains open in a consistent format.
AI agents should use this template after substantial work.

# Maintenance Instructions

Update this template when the team changes the expected close-out format for implementation work.
Humans or AI may update it.
Generated completion notes should stay aligned with [docs/tasks.md](../tasks.md) and [docs/design/design.md](../design/design.md).

# TASK-<ID>-COMPLETION

## Overview

- Task ID:
- Summary:
- Outcome:

## Technical Decisions Made

-

## File Structure

- Files added:
- Files modified:

-

## Lessons Learned
